nasb.text: For the Lord your God is bringing you into a good land, a land of brooks of water, of fountains and springs, flowing forth in valleys and hills;

esv.text: For the Lord your God is bringing you into a good land, a land of brooks of water, of fountains and springs, flowing out in the valleys and hills,

cnv.text: 因為耶和華你的　神快要領你進入那美地；那地有河流，有泉，有源，水從谷中和山上流出來；

ccb.text: 因为祂要带你们到一个佳美之地。那里的谷中和山间流淌着条条溪流、股股清泉；
